Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Update e2e-test-prompt.md for Consolidated E2E Infrastructure

## Context

Commit `83edba93` ("Consolidate E2E test suite into cli repo") moved the entire E2E test infrastructure from `cmd/entire/cli/e2e_test/` into a new top-level `e2e/` directory with a completely restructured architecture. The skill file at `.claude/skills/agent-integration/e2e-test-prompt.md` still references the old paths, types, patterns, and commands. It needs a full rewrite to match the new infrastructure.

## Key Changes to Reflect

| Aspect | Old | New |
|--------|-----|-----|
| Test location | `cmd/entire/cli/e2e_test/` | `e2e/` (multiple packages) |
| Agent abstraction | `AgentRunner` interface in `agent_runner.go` | `Agent` interface in `e2e/agents/agent.go` |
| Setup | `setup_test.go` (`TestMain`) | `e2e/tests/main_test.go` |
| Repo helpers | `testenv.go` (`TestEnv`, `NewFeatureBranchEnv`) | `e2e/testutil/repo.go` (`RepoState`, `SetupRepo`, `ForEachAgent`) |
| Assertions | `assertions.go` | `e2e/testutil/assertions.go` (much richer) |
| Prompts file | `prompts.go` (`PromptTemplate`) | Removed — prompts are inline in tests |
| Entire CLI wrapper | N/A | `e2e/entire/entire.go` |
| Metadata types | N/A | `e2e/testutil/metadata.go` |
| Artifacts | Manual | `e2e/testutil/artifacts.go` (automatic via t.Cleanup) |
| Interactive sessions | N/A | `e2e/agents/tmux.go` (tmux PTY) |
| Package names | `package e2e` (single) | `agents`, `testutil`, `tests`, `entire` |
| Build command | `go test -c -tags=e2e ./cmd/entire/cli/e2e_test` | `go test -c -tags=e2e ./e2e/tests` |
| Run commands | `E2E_AGENT=$SLUG go test -tags=e2e ...` | `mise run test:e2e:$SLUG TestFoo` |
| Agent runner pattern | `AgentRunner` struct + `NewAgentRunner` factory | `Agent` interface + `Register()` in `init()` |
| Concurrency | Manual | `RegisterGate()` + `ForEachAgent` auto-gating |
| Timeout | Hardcoded | `TimeoutMultiplier()` per agent |
| Transient errors | Manual | `IsTransientError(
